x-scalar-sdk-installation.description: Install our **ONLYOFFICE SDK** for Node.js from npm:
Install our **ONLYOFFICE SDK** for Python app from pip:
Install our **ONLYOFFICE SDK** for .Net from nuget:

post.description: Creates a user API key with the parameters specified in the request.

get.description: Returns a list of all API keys for the current user.

200.description: List of api keys for user

get.description: Returns a list of all available permissions for the API key.

200.description: List of all available permissions for key

get.description: Returns information about the current user's API key.

200.description: List of api keys for user

put.description: Updates an existing API key changing its name, permissions, and status.

parameters.description: The unique identifier of the API key to update.

requestBody.description: The request parameters for updating an existing API key.

200.description: Update optional params for user api keys

delete.description: Deletes a user API key by its ID.

get.description: Returns the general information about all the groups, such as group ID and group manager.

parameters.description: The user ID.

parameters.name: manager
parameters.description: Specifies if the user is a manager or not.

parameters.description: The number of records to retrieve.

parameters.description: The starting index for paginated results.

parameters.name: sortBy
parameters.description: Specifies the property used to sort the query results.

parameters.description: The order in which the results are sorted.

parameters.name: filterValue
parameters.description: The text used for filtering or searching group data.
